steps.title: DB schema 加 isolation/worktree_path/worktree_branch 三列 + 类型 + CRUD 同步
steps.verify: SQLite 表含三列；老行迁移后 isolation='shared'；server tsc 通过

steps.title: 新建 worktree-paths.ts (getWorktreeRoot/getWorktreePath)
steps.verify: 返回路径符合 <server-root>/data/worktrees/<projectId>/<sessionId>；tsc 通过

steps.title: GitService 加 addWorktree/removeWorktree/listWorktrees
steps.verify: addWorktree 后 git worktree list 含新条目；removeWorktree 后消失；失败抛 GitServiceError 含 stderr

steps.title: routes/sessions.ts isolation 参数 + spawn 前建 worktree + DELETE ?gc=true + 操作日志
steps.verify: POST 隔离 session → 201 + worktreeBranch；目录创建；DELETE?gc=true 清掉；非 git 项目隔离请求 → 400；LogsView 含 worktree-add 起止

steps.title: routes/projects.ts 删项目前 GC 该 project 的所有 worktree
steps.verify: 删项目后 data/worktrees/<projectId>/ 整个目录被清

steps.title: 前端 types.ts + api.ts 加字段/参数
StartSessionMenu 加 🌿 工作区隔离复选框 + start 携带 isolation
steps.verify: 浏览器看到复选框；非 git 项目灰掉；勾上启动 Network body.isolation==='worktree'

steps.title: session 标签前缀 🌿 <branch> (仅 isolation==='worktree')
steps.verify: V1 浏览器看到隔离 session 标签含 🌿 + 短分支名

steps.title: 关闭 session 弹窗加'也删除 worktree'复选 + deleteSession 携带 gc
steps.verify: V4 三条分支：保留 / 删除 / 取消

steps.title: README Concepts 加 worktree 段；新建 dev/learnings.md 写一条
scripts/worktree-smoke.mjs + package.json smoke:worktree 脚本
steps.verify: pnpm smoke:worktree 全绿（含两 session 写同名文件主仓干净 assert）

steps.title: 全量验收：浏览器 V1-V4 + ERROR 日志 + tsc + 全量 smoke
